heading: Urban and other high risk area communications capabilities
label: 577 Urban and other high risk area communications capabilities

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with the Chairman of the Federal Communications Commission and the Secretary of Defense, and with appropriate State, local, and tribal government officials, shall provide technical guidance, training, and other assistance, as appropriate, to support the rapid establishment of consistent, secure, and effective interoperable emergency communications capabilities in the event of an emergency in urban and other areas determined by the Secretary to be at consistently high levels of risk from natural disasters, acts of terrorism, and other man-made disasters.
to communicate with each other in the event of an emergency;
to have appropriate and timely access to the Information Sharing Environment described in ; andsection 485 of this title
to be consistent with any applicable State or Urban Area homeland strategy or plan.
